questionHtml: Describe one way in which microorganisms in this fermenter could be limited by their own activities.
markschemeHtml:
a. name of a factor 

b. description


eg
a. pH
b.lowered by «ethanoic» acid production.

eg
a. increase in temperature
b. due to metabolism.

eg
a. increased population size/reproduction
b. would limit resources.

eg
a. increased metabolic waste
b. reduce population.
